name: harness-pro-plugin
description: Coordinator skill for long, multi-step development tasks. Orchestrates plan-agent, worker, reviewer, e2e-runner, and doc-updater through an 8-step pipeline. Bundles utell-ios MCP server for iOS simulator automation.

UTELL_BUNDLE_ID.title: iOS Bundle ID
UTELL_BUNDLE_ID.description: Optional. Auto-detected from your Xcode project via ios_auto_configure. Set this only to override the auto-detected value.

UTELL_WDA_PATH.title: WDA Project Path
UTELL_WDA_PATH.description: Path to the WebDriverAgent directory (containing WebDriverAgent.xcodeproj). If not set, ios_start_wda searches common locations automatically.
